title: HEARTBEAT Message
description: RCAN message type 5. Periodic liveness probe sent between a robot and its connected brain or bridge. Used to detect connection loss and measure round-trip latency.

message_type.description: Identifies this as a HEARTBEAT message.

ruri.description: RURI of the entity sending the heartbeat.

timestamp_ms.description: Unix epoch time in milliseconds when the heartbeat was emitted.

message_id.description: UUIDv4 for this heartbeat. The receiver echoes this ID in its HEARTBEAT_ACK.

latency_budget_ms.description: Maximum acceptable round-trip time in milliseconds. If a HEARTBEAT_ACK is not received within this window, the connection is considered stale.
